title: CAVA: Canonical Action Verification and Attestation for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source acquisition for review-cava-runtime-action-canonicalization-validity; this record is not a deep review or release audit.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 API entry contains a normal abstract and no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: The complete immutable 35-page v1 PDF extracted successfully. The title and abstract, main manuscript, canonicalization and benchmark material, system-card/capability sections, artifact and disclosure appendices, references, and final page were inspected for continuity.

official_repository.identity_evidence: The repository identifies itself with the same CAVA title and author-associated project, cites arXiv:2607.13716, and is the release URL named by the queued review task. This acquisition record does not independently establish paper-time artifact identity.
official_repository.license: Apache-2.0 as reported by the GitHub repository API and archived LICENSE.
official_repository.timing_boundary: The repository's first public commit is timestamped 6 minutes 20 seconds after the arXiv v1 submission timestamp. The pinned commit is from the next day and corrects the arXiv identifier. It is current official release evidence, not a demonstrated byte-identical paper-time implementation.

acquisition_scope: Complete immutable-v1 paper/PDF/text plus a commit-pinned snapshot of the small public open-core repository and GitHub metadata. The archive was integrity-tested but not yet deeply audited or executed.
claim_boundary: This evidence supports later full-paper reading and static/executable release audit. Acquisition alone does not establish canonicalization correctness, benchmark reproducibility, semantic identity, approval binding, observed execution, production parser coverage, governance efficacy, professional validity, safety, or readiness.
